how_it_works.subtitle: Five steps to your new workspace

steps.title: 1. Create your space

steps.title: 2. Add notes

steps.title: 3. Switch views anytime
steps.description: Canvas for brainstorming, Kanban for tasks, Calendar for deadlines, Directory for organization. All on the same data.
steps.subtitle: Same data, different perspectives

steps.title: 4. Oracle AI organizes
steps.description: Ask Oracle AI to analyze your space, create tasks, summarize findings, or answer questions about your content.
steps.subtitle: AI connects and structures your workspace

steps.title: 5. Real-time collaboration
steps.description: Your team's shared workspace follows you on any device. Your data stays private with secure access controls, and everything syncs automatically so nobody ever misses a thing.
steps.subtitle: Shared workspace on any device

features.subtitle: Four views. AI that acts. All your files. Works everywhere.

unified.title: One space. Four views.
unified.description: Canvas for brainstorming, Kanban for tasks, Calendar for deadlines, Directory for organization. Switch instantly on the same data—no export, no import.

agentic.title: AI that takes action
agentic.description: Oracle doesn't just chat. It reads your files, answers questions, creates tasks, edits content, and keeps your space organized—autonomously.

storage.title: All your files, in one place
storage.description: Store PDFs, images, documents, and links alongside your thoughts. Everything indexed and searchable. Your complete knowledge base.

sync.title: Works everywhere
sync.description: Start on desktop, continue on mobile. Offline-first with automatic cloud sync. Your workspace follows you.

items.pain: Is your team's info everywhere — 67 open tabs, Notion, Slack, Drive, emails?
items.solution: One shared space. Everything connected, everyone aligned.

items.pain: How much time do you waste turning notes into tasks, calendar events, and AI prompts every week?
items.solution: Think, plan, and execute with your team and AI — all in one place.

items.pain: Do you open a task and waste 15 minutes figuring out what it's about?
items.solution: Your team and AI work in the same space. No more digging.

items.pain: Are you tired of copy-pasting between your workspace and AI?
items.solution: Your team and Oracle AI work in the same space. No more copy-pasting.

demo.description: Watch Oracle AI build a complex research space organizing documents, images, and maps in real-time.

testimonials.description: Join other researchers, designers, and engineers who have upgraded their mental space.

items.quote: I used to have 20 tabs open just to hold a thought. Now I drop everything on the canvas and it finds its own place. I don't organize anymore. The space organizes itself around how I think.
items.author: Nidhal G.

items.quote: I uploaded my entire research folder and asked Oracle to make sense of it. It built a structured workspace from 30 pages of scattered notes in seconds. I didn't organize my thesis. My thesis organized itself.
items.author: Mohamed C.

items.quote: I stopped switching between my task app, my calendar, and my notes. The same thought sits on my canvas, in my kanban, and on my timeline. When I move it in one view, it moves everywhere. It's one mind, not six apps.
items.author: Nadia D.

community.title: Join the community
community.description: Help shape the platform. Share feedback, report bugs, and connect with other thinkers.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the platform.

items.question: What is Cyberia Space?
items.answer: Cyberia combines four views — Canvas, Directory, Kanban, and Calendar — on the same data. Switch between freeform canvases, list views, task boards, and timeline views instantly. Oracle AI acts on your content, not just answers questions. It's the only workspace where the AI doesn't just chat — it creates, edits, and organizes.

items.question: Is my data private and secure?
items.answer: Yes. Your space follows a Local-First philosophy. By default, all your work is stored locally in your browser's IndexedDB. When you authenticate, data is synced securely via HTTPS/TLS encryption in transit and stored securely in the cloud.

items.question: How does the 'Oracle' AI handle my data?
items.answer: Oracle uses advanced reasoning models to analyze your space in real-time. We never use your personal data or content to train AI models. Your history stays local on your device.

items.question: What happens when I downgrade from Pro to Free?
items.answer: When you downgrade, nothing is deleted. All your thoughts, spaces, and files stay safe and accessible. You just won't be able to create beyond free plan limits until you upgrade again.

items.question: Do subscriptions automatically renew?
items.answer: It depends on your provider. Local payments via Flouci are manual (no auto-charges). International subscriptions via Polar.sh are recurring and can be canceled at any time through the customer portal.

items.question: Why is there no mobile app yet?
items.answer: Cyberia is built for desktop. Precision work on a canvas needs a mouse and screen space. Mobile companion apps coming soon.

article_1.title: Article 1: Overview
article_1.content: Cyberia Space ("we," "us," or "our") is an AI-powered workspace designed with a Local-First philosophy. We attach the greatest importance to the protection of your personal data and wish to ensure the best level of protection in compliance with applicable regulations.

article_2.title: Article 2: Local-First Data Storage
article_2.content_1: By default, all thoughts, tasks, drawings, and files you create are stored locally in your browser's internal database (IndexedDB).
article_2.content_2: When you authenticate your account, your space is automatically synced to the cloud for backup and cross-device access.

article_3.title: Article 3: Data We Collect
article_3.content: We collect minimal personal data to provide and improve our services:
article_3.identity_info_desc: Email address and profile name via Google OAuth for account management and identity verification.
article_3.usage_data_desc: Basic technical logs to detect errors and optimize application performance.
article_3.payment_data_desc: We receive transaction confirmation tokens from our providers (Flouci and Polar.sh). We do not store your credit card numbers or sensitive financial details.

article_4.title: Article 4: Cloud Synchronization
article_4.content_1: When you authenticate your account, your space metadata and research assets are stored securely in Supabase (PostgreSQL database and Cloud Storage).
article_4.content_2: This allows for persistent storage across multiple devices and ensures data continuity if your browser cache is cleared.

article_5.title: Article 5: AI Data Protocol (The Oracle)
article_5.content: Interactions with "The Oracle" involve real-time inference via high-speed models (hosted via OpenRouter, utilizing models from OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, etc.).
article_5.bullet_1: Relevant space snippets are processed temporarily to generate responses.
article_5.bullet_2: Your space data is never used for model training.
article_5.bullet_3: AI chat history is stored locally on your device for maximum privacy.

article_6.title: Article 6: Security Measures
article_6.content: We have implemented robust security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used, or accessed in an unauthorized way. Access to your data is strictly limited to processes necessary for providing the service.

article_7.title: Article 7: Your Legal Rights
article_7.content: In accordance with Tunisian and international data protection regulations, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data.
article_7.portability_desc: You can export your entire space as a JSON file at any time.
article_7.erasure_desc: You can request the deletion of your account and associated cloud data directly from the application settings.

article_8.title: Article 8: Contact
article_8.content: For any questions regarding this policy or to exercise your rights, please contact us at:

article_1.title: Article 1: Scope & Acceptance
article_1.content: These General Terms of Sale (CGV) apply to all subscriptions and services purchased on Cyberia (cyberiaspace.app). By upgrading your account, you agree to be bound by these terms. Cyberia is an AI-powered workspace developed by Cyberia AI Studio.

article_2.title: Article 2: Subscription & Account
article_2.content: To access Pro features, you must create an account and subscribe to a plan. Your subscription is tied to your Google identity.
article_2.pro_tier_desc: Grants enhanced storage, higher Oracle AI limits, and other premium features.
article_2.account_responsibility_desc: You are responsible for all activity occurring under your account. We reserve the right to suspend accounts violating our policies.

article_3.title: Article 3: Billing & Renewals
article_3.local_payments_desc: Payments via Flouci follow a manual renewal model. We do not automatically charge your payment method. You must manually renew your subscription to maintain Pro access.
article_3.international_payments_desc: Subscriptions via Polar.sh are automatic recurring subscriptions. Your payment method will be charged at the start of each billing cycle (monthly or yearly) unless you cancel your subscription through the customer portal.

article_4.title: Article 4: Pricing & Payment
article_4.content: Prices are indicated in the application and on the website in the local currency (TND for Tunisia) or USD for international users.
article_4.security_desc: We do not store your financial data. All transactions are encrypted and processed by our third-party payment gateways.

article_5.title: Article 5: Refund Policy
article_5.content: Given the digital nature of the services and the instant access to Pro features and AI processing resources:
article_5.final_sale: All sales are final. We do not offer refunds or credits for any reason.
article_5.free_tier_note: Please use the Free Tier to ensure the service meets your requirements before upgrading.

article_6.title: Article 6: Service Availability
article_6.content: Cyberia Space strives for high uptime but is provided "as is". We are not liable for data loss due to technical failure, browser instability, or synchronization conflicts. Users are encouraged to use the "Export Workspace" feature regularly.

article_7.title: Article 7: Acceptable Use Policy
article_7.content_1: Cyberia Space is an AI-powered workspace and knowledge management platform. It is designed for personal productivity, research, and AI-assisted analysis of private documents.
article_7.bullet_1: Personal knowledge management and note organization
article_7.bullet_2: AI-assisted analysis of privately uploaded research documents and PDFs
article_7.bullet_3: Team collaboration within private, authenticated workspaces
article_7.bullet_4: Storing files as contextual attachments to thoughts and projects

article_8.title: Article 8: Prohibited Uses
article_8.content: The following uses of Cyberia Space are strictly prohibited:
article_8.bullet_1: Uploading or sharing files for the purpose of distributing content to the public or third parties
article_8.bullet_2: Using the storage layer as a direct file distribution or "cyberlocker" mechanism
article_8.bullet_3: Attempting to bypass access controls or extract files for unauthorized sharing
article_8.bullet_4: Hosting content that infringes on intellectual property rights
article_8.bullet_5: Uploading content that violates applicable laws or our Terms of Service
article_8.bullet_6: Using the platform as a CDN or public file hosting service
article_8.violation_note: Violations may result in immediate account suspension, permanent deletion of content, and referral to appropriate authorities.

article_9.title: Article 9: Governing Law
article_9.content: These Terms of Sale and any disputes arising from them shall be governed by the laws of Tunisia.

section_1.title: 1. Corporate Identity
section_1.content: Cyberia Space is developed and operated by Anas Bassoumi, operating under the trade name Cyberia AI Studio in Tunisia.
section_1.address: Rue Taieb El Azzabi, Hammamet, 8050, Nabeul, Tunisia

section_2.title: 2. Website Hosting
section_2.hosting_address: 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States.

section_3.title: 3. Intellectual Property
section_3.content: All content, design, code, and interfaces related to Cyberia Space are the exclusive property of Cyberia AI Studio. Unauthorized reproduction, modification, or distribution is strictly prohibited. Users retain ownership of the content they create within their space.

section_4.title: 4. Governing Law
section_4.content: This Legal Notice and any disputes arising from it shall be governed by the laws of Tunisia. Any disputes shall be resolved in accordance with Tunisian jurisdiction.
